message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam packageBorderColor #000000
skinparam packageBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F7F7F7
skinparam classBorderColor #777777
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

left to right direction

package "otherservice" as otherservice {
  class "SmartValueTargetServiceContracts" as SmartValueTargetServiceContracts
}

package "billing" as billing {

  class "TotalFee" as TotalFee

  package "discount" as discount {
    class "DiscountFee" as DiscountFee
    class "DiscountService" as DiscountService
    class "ContractForDiscount" as ContractForDiscount
  }

  package "contract" as contract {
    class "ContractFee" as ContractFee
    class "ContractForCharge\nDataMax5GPLan" as ContractForCharge
  }
}

package "contractmanage" as contractmanage {
  class "FamilyContracts" as FamilyContracts
  class "Contract" as Contract
  interface "ContractRepository" as ContractRepository
}

package "plan" as plan {
  class "Plan" as Plan
}

' Relationships
DiscountService --> SmartValueTargetServiceContracts

TotalFee --> DiscountFee
TotalFee --> ContractFee

DiscountService --> DiscountFee
DiscountService --> ContractForDiscount

ContractForCharge --> ContractFee

ContractRepository --> FamilyContracts
ContractRepository --> Contract

DiscountService --> FamilyContracts
ContractForDiscount --> Contract
ContractForCharge --> Contract

Contract --> Plan
ContractForCharge --> Plan

@enduml
```
